headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Generac Holdings, Raises Price Target to $280
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Praneeth Satish   maintains Generac Holdings (NYSE:GNRC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $238 to $280.
